name: Improper Validation of Array Index
description: The product uses untrusted input as an array index without validating that the value falls within the valid range of the array, potentially causing out-of-bounds read/write, crashes, or arbitrary code execution.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a value used as an array index at STORAGE[array_access] without a CONTROL[bounds_check] node that validates the index is >= 0 and < array.length before the access operation
